title: AEO for a Personal Website: What I Changed After Auditing 13 Sites
summary: I audited a month of self-hosted analytics across 13 sites to see whether AI answer engines were already sending traffic. They were. Here is the practical AEO work that survived contact with the data: clean identity signals, accurate sitemaps, citable original evidence, and a deliberately unglamorous llms.txt experiment.
disclosure: Prepared with Codex under the direction and review of David W. Rose; the analytics, implementation details, and conclusions were checked against the live systems.
